query: What is the torque specification for the chamber flange bolts?
ground_truth_answer: The chamber flange bolts (Part No. ABC-F-0012, 3/4"-10 A286) require a torque of 185 ±5 ft-lbs with Molycoat lubrication.

query: What material is used for the nozzle wall?
ground_truth_answer: The nozzle wall is made of Inconel 718, with the chamber liner made of GRCop-84.

query: What is the throat diameter of the RX-84 nozzle?
ground_truth_answer: The throat diameter of the RX-84 nozzle is 1.62 meters.

query: What weld process is used for the chamber-to-nozzle joint?
ground_truth_answer: Electron Beam Welding (EBW) per AWS D17.1 Class A, using Inconel 625 (ERNiCrMo-3) filler material.

query: What were the results of the dye penetrant inspection?
ground_truth_answer: PASS — No linear indications. Two rounded indications less than 1mm were found, which are acceptable per specification.

query: What is the maximum surface temperature for the PICA-X thermal protection?
ground_truth_answer: The maximum surface temperature for PICA-X is 3,200°F.

query: What is the ablation rate requirement for the thermal protection system?
ground_truth_answer: The PICA-X ablation rate must be ≤0.025 in/s at 100 BTU/ft²·s heat flux.

query: What is the LOX turbopump operating speed?
ground_truth_answer: The LOX turbopump operates at 36,200 RPM.

query: What type of bearings are used in the turbopump?
ground_truth_answer: The turbopump uses hydrostatic bearings.

query: What is the combustion chamber pressure of the RX-84 engine?
ground_truth_answer: The RX-84 combustion chamber pressure (Pc) is 1,334 psi.

query: What was the proof pressure used in the LOX tank hydrostatic test?
ground_truth_answer: The proof pressure was 65.6 psig (1.25× the MEOP of 52.5 psig).

query: Was any permanent deformation found during the hydrostatic test?
ground_truth_answer: Permanent deformation was 0.0012 inches, which is within the limit of <0.005 inches.

query: How many bolt holes are on the chamber-nozzle flange?
ground_truth_answer: There are 24 bolt holes (Ø 0.812 in) on a 34.2-inch bolt circle diameter.

query: What is the thrust chamber wall thickness tolerance?
ground_truth_answer: The minimum wall thickness is 0.180 inches with a tolerance of +0.020/-0.000 inches. The measured value was 0.185 inches.

query: What is the manufacturing cycle time for the RX-84 thrust chamber?
ground_truth_answer: The total manufacturing cycle time for the RX-84 thrust chamber is approximately 18 weeks.

query: What quality hold points exist in the manufacturing process?
ground_truth_answer: Quality hold points are after steps 1 (Raw Material Receiving), 4 (EB Welding), 6 (NDE Inspection), and 7 (Hydrostatic Proof Test).

query: What is the helium leak rate specification for the weld joint?
ground_truth_answer: The helium leak rate must be less than 1×10⁻⁷ std cc/s. The measured leak rate was less than 1×10⁻⁸ std cc/s — PASS.

query: What lubricant is specified for the LOX dome bolts?
ground_truth_answer: Krytox (PFPE per ABC-SPEC-LUB-003) is specified for the LOX dome bolts (Part No. ABC-F-0050).

query: What type of seal is used in the turbopump?
ground_truth_answer: The turbopump uses a helium-purged labyrinth seal.

query: What is the density of the PICA-X thermal protection material?
ground_truth_answer: The density of PICA-X is 0.27 g/cm³ (±0.02).

query: How many coaxial injector elements are in the RX-84 main injector?
ground_truth_answer: The RX-84 main injector has 462 coaxial elements. The face is made of Inconel 625 with braze per AMS 4777 (BNi-2).

query: What is the RX-84 engine expansion ratio?
ground_truth_answer: The RX-84 nozzle has an expansion ratio of 40:1, with a throat diameter of 1.62 m and exit diameter of 2.74 m.

query: What is the endurance limit of Inconel 718 at room temperature?
ground_truth_answer: The endurance limit of Inconel 718 at room temperature (fully reversed, R=-1) is 68 ksi per ASTM E466 testing.

query: What is the maximum wall temperature at the nozzle throat?
ground_truth_answer: The steady-state wall temperature at the nozzle throat (coolant side) is 1,420°F, with hot gas temperature at 5,880°F.

query: What is the specific impulse of the RX-84 at sea level?
ground_truth_answer: The RX-84 sea-level specific impulse (Isp) is nominally 325 seconds. Hot-fire test HF-2024-0088 measured 324.6 seconds (within ±2% tolerance).

query: What is the stress rupture life of Inconel 718 at 1200°F?
ground_truth_answer: At 1200°F and 100 ksi, the actual stress rupture life was 42 hours (spec minimum: 23 hours).
